overview: CinePareja is a couples app for tracking movies and series together, managing a shared watchlist, planning meals, keeping a photo album, chatting, and viewing relationship statistics. Real-time sync between both partners via Internet Identity authentication.
features: Movie and series progress tracking with reviews and star ratings
Shared watchlist and completed titles section
Statistics dashboard: completed titles, hours watched, top genres, average rating, best/worst rated
Daily photo album organized by date
